TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: Tsou-frog-story-wang-1

S.FORM: mo cihi ci oko eh mo tʉtpʉtʉ to fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩捉了一隻青蛙。
A child caught a frog.

S.FORM: isi teapha to pania.
S.TRANSL: 他（把牠）裝在一個瓶子裡。
He put it in a container.

S.FORM: ma mo aasoe eh pkaako 'e pania 'ia pkaako 'e fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子..不, 是青蛙偷偷的逃走了。
The frog escaped stealthily from the container.

S.FORM: eN 'iama pkaako 'o eh fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 他看到青蛙逃走了
He saw that the frog had escaped.

S.FORM: ihe cu eh i'ima i'ima ta aemana ho acʉha top'op'eni 'e mo mav'ov'o ci macucuma ho.
S.TRANSL: 他們在房子裡面找, 他把很多容器翻過來找。
They looked for the frog (everywhere) inside the house. They turned every container over and looked for (the frog).

S.FORM: ihe ta'unano mo nooyo.
S.TRANSL: 他們以為青蛙在那些容器裡面。
He thought (the frog) was inside (of the containers).

S.FORM: eN isi yuoeva ta av'usi 'e pania pania ci osi yoni to.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗把牠的頭塞進原來裝青蛙的瓶子裡面。
His dog inserted its head inside the container where the frog had been.

S.FORM: 'a isi teolʉi na fo'kunge hoci n'a eh nooyo.
S.TRANSL: 他沒看到青蛙在裡面。
(He) didn't see the frog inside.

S.FORM: eh mi cu m'oh'ʉtʉ ta pethʉ'ta ho eoho'a 'o fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 他把頭往窗外伸呼叫這隻青蛙。
He headed out of the window and called the frog.

S.FORM: um moso maezo eh m'oh'ʉtʉ 'e av'u ho m to pania 'o fnguusi.
S.TRANSL: 狗也跟著往外伸出頭, 牠的頭是在瓶子裡
The dog whose head had been inserted inside the container also headed out.

S.FORM: uh mo supeohʉ ta pethu'ta 'e fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙從窗戶掉下去。
The frog fell by the window.

S.FORM: mi cu eh uh ta peohnasi 'e oko ho eh pasaha 'e av'u.
S.TRANSL: 男孩去窗戶底下抱起狗。
The boy went underneath the window and held the dog.

S.FORM: eh eh i in ipopoha i'ima.
S.TRANSL: 他們兩個一起去找青蛙。
They went to look for (the frog) together.

S.FORM: um nemio mo m'ooyo to na ito feongo 'o oko ho eh na iho teʉ'tʉmi 'o fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 那時候, 小孩頭伸進去洞裡找青蛙。
At that time, the child headed into the hole and looked for the frog.

S.FORM: mo eh m'oyafo si eh buhci ceoa ho.
S.TRANSL: 一隻老鼠從地裡往外伸出(身體)。
A mouse came out from the ground.

S.FORM: eh na iho yu'hanga 'e oko.
S.TRANSL: 那老鼠討厭那小孩。
(The mouse) did not like the child.

S.FORM: eh i'o av'u isi eh aiti 'o ceoyu ci mo tmiehi isi cu taʉza 'e ceoyu.
S.TRANSL: 狗看見吊掛在樹上的蜂窩就搖那蜂窩。
The dog saw a bee(hive) hanging (down) and shook it.

S.FORM: taʉza ta av'u eh ceoyu ho isi cu tapeoha em i'e oko mo capo ta evi ho m'ooyo to eN feongo to evi ho i'ima 'o fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上那棵樹，把頭伸進樹洞裡找青蛙。
The child climbed a tree and looked for the frog inside a hole.

S.FORM: nemio 'e ne 'e oko eh ne mo m'ooyo to feongo.
S.TRANSL: 那時候這個小孩（頭）伸進洞裡面。
When the child inserted (his head) into the hole,

S.FORM: 'iama mo nooyo 'o na i'o puku.
S.TRANSL: 原來那個貓頭鷹在樹洞裡面。
(It was) an owl (inside the tree).

S.FORM: um mo yamci 'e oko ho oh na iho supeohʉ supeohʉ ta evi.
S.TRANSL: 小孩嚇到了從樹上掉下來。
The child got frightened and fell down.

S.FORM: eN maica ho isi taʉza to av'u 'o na i'o ceoyu 'a isi tapeoha ho mi cu mee aemo' 'e ceoyu ho meobango ta isi cu peobanga 'e av'u.
S.TRANSL: 狗搖蜂窩，把(蜂窩)(搖了)掉下來，蜂四散飛，追那隻狗。
The dog shook the (beehive) and caused (the beehive) fall. The bees scattered and chased the dog.

S.FORM: um isi yu'hanga to puku 'e oko.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹討厭那小孩。
The owl hated the child.

S.FORM: isi n'a asngʉca ah peobanga ho ucia tupnui.
S.TRANSL: 他一直追小孩想要啄他。
(The owl) chased (the boy) and wanted to peck at him.

S.FORM: eN ataveisi eh mi cu capo to meoi no fatu 'e oko ho.
S.TRANSL: 後來小孩爬上一塊大石頭。
Then the child climbed a rock.

S.FORM: aoka eoho'a 'e 'e na i'o fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 他一直叫那青蛙。
He went on calling the frog.

S.FORM: eh pan to isi ti'eopi ci isi ta'unana evi eh 'iama eh sungu to 'ua 'o isi ti'eopi.
S.TRANSL: 他抓著一個東西，他以為那是樹，原來是鹿的角。
The boy thought he was holding a branch, (but it turned out to be) a deer's antler.

S.FORM: isi cu uh mi cu msipngi to sungu to 'ua 'e oko isi cu hafa ta 'ua 'e.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩卡在鹿的角上，鹿就帶著(孩子)跑。
The child got stuck between the deer's antlers. He was carried by the deer.

S.FORM: oko ho 'a isi cu eh eh ciha ta na ita tʉ'nʉ.
S.TRANSL: 那鹿(帶著小孩),把小孩摔落到懸崖。
The deer (took the child and) threw him over the cliff.

S.FORM: ah eaz maezo 'e av'u ho supeohʉ.
S.TRANSL: 狗也跟著掉下去。
The dog also fell down.

S.FORM: eN 'oc'ocic'o eh su' ta chumu 'e oko ho i'e av'u.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗剛好掉到水裡去。
The child and the dog fell into the water.

S.FORM: eh mi cu um mia'unu maica 'e 'e oko um smopayo ta fnguusi 'e av'u em mi cu meac'ʉhʉ to mo na ito mo eaevia.
S.TRANSL: 小狗（坐）在小孩的頭上，他們漂流到有樹的地方。
The dog (sat) on the child's head. They floated toward where there was a tree.

S.FORM: isi cu enca 'e av'u o'te s'a aomotʉ'ʉ o'te s'a ea'ei.
S.TRANSL: 他叫那狗不要講話。"不要說話"。
He told the dog not to speak. "Don't speak. (Be quiet.)"

S.FORM: 'ia isi enca 'e av'u o'te s'a muni.
S.TRANSL: 他跟那隻狗說不要出聲音。
He told the dog not to make any sound.

S.FORM: eh ihe cu eh mi cu capo ta c na ita ceaf'u ho na ita mo ea ta mo feongo ci ceaf'u ho eh ihe cu uh op'opeeveni 'o ciengona ta na ita ceaf'u.
S.TRANSL: 他們爬上一個（倒下的）枯樹幹，上面有一個洞。他們探頭看枯樹的另一邊。
They climbed over a log. There was a hole in the log, and they peeked to the other side.

S.FORM: eh ihe cu eh teolʉi 'o mo yuso ci fo'kunge mo noepohʉ ta f'uf'u ta na ita ceaf'u.
S.TRANSL: 他們看見兩隻青蛙一起在枯樹底下。
They saw two frogs together under the log.

S.FORM: eN ihe cu isi cu aiti to oko 'o anana'osi 'o anana'osi iachi fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 男孩看到那原本是屬於他的青蛙。
The boy saw the frog which had belonged to him for a long time.

S.FORM: isi cu eh isi cu ea ho hafa maine'e.
S.TRANSL: 他拿著那青蛙帶牠回家。
He took (the frog) home.
